About Crown
Since its founding in 2000
, Crown has been delivering adhesive tape solutions to our global customers.
CROWN is customer-oriented, specializes in the R&D and mass production of pressure sensitive adhesives such as adhesive tapes and functional films.
CROWNâ s products are widely used in consumer electronics, home appliances, automobiles, new energy, wearables, and other general industries.

3000+

5 production sites: 4 production sites in China, 1 in Vietnam.
12 sales offices and 4 overseas branches (USA, Taiwan.CN, Vietnam, and Hong Kong.CN).

about CROWN
Since its founding in 2000
, Crown has been delivering adhesive tape solutions to all our customers. CROWN is customer-oriented, specializes in the R&D and mass production of pressure sensitive adhesives such as adhesive tapes and functional films. CROWNâs products are widely used in consumer electronics, home appliances, automobiles, new energy, wearables, and other general industries.
CROWN currently has five manufacturing sites, with four in China located in Zhongshan, Jiangmen, Suzhou and Huzhou and one in Vietnam. Crown has mastered adhesive synthesis, formulation and precision coating technologyï¼and has set up 16 sales offices and subsidiaries home and abroad. CROWN products are widely sold in more than 30 countries and regions. Crown is determined to be a technology pioneer in the adhesive industry, and to build an international brand.
